lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive wear on both the exterior and interior. Major repairs are required.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior presents nicely with a strong shine, though there are minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear bumper from typical use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, showing only light wear on the driver's side seat bolster and common touchpoints. Mechanically, the car is solid, shifts smoothly, and has received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. It is a reliable and honest example that is ready for its next owner without needing immediate repairs.

Looking for a budget-friendly and dependable vehicle? This car is a solid runner that has been a reliable companion over the years! It shows some clear signs of its history with some visible wear and tear inside and out, but it still offers a steady drive and is ready to get you where you need to go. A great opportunity to get into a functional car at an accessible price!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable point-to-point transport, though it shows its age in several areas. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, but you may notice a slight vibration at highway speeds and the engine would benefit from a comprehensive tune-up in the near future. The transmission shifts through all gears, though it lacks the crispness of a newer model. Cosmetically, the exterior has several noticeable scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger door, while the interior shows typical wear including some fading on the upholstery and a few minor stains. It is a solid choice for someone looking for a functional vehicle who doesn't mind performing some cosmetic or minor mechanical updates.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and perform as new.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and longevity. Experience a refined driving environment in a vehicle that has been treated with professional care and remains in commendable state for its next steward.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape—super reliable and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car handles beautifully and is ready to hit the road today. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it'll make its next owner very happy! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin.

Offered is a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This example is equipped with the desirable 6-speed Getrag manual transmission, delivering power through a limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a VANOS system refresh and subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. The engine exhibits crisp throttle response via its individual throttle bodies and pulls cleanly to its 8,000 RPM redline. Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Runs smooth.

This meticulously maintained vehicle presents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear typical of a well-cared-for car. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium upholstery is free of significant wear, and all electronic features, from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system, operate as intended. Mechanically, it is robust and dependable, benefiting from a consistent service history that ensures a smooth, quiet ride and responsive performance. It has been garage-kept, smoke-free, and recently detailed, making it a turnkey choice for anyone seeking quality and reliability.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it offers a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure compliance with our rigorous standards, presenting an exceptional value for those who demand quality and poise in their daily commute.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience complemented by a well-preserved aesthetic. Each component has been vetted to meet our rigorous standards, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated acquisition for the discerning professional.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my reliable ride. It’s been so well-loved and is in great shape, perfect for someone who wants a smooth, dependable car without the brand-new price tag. It handles beautifully and has plenty of life left for all your upcoming road trips and daily commutes. I’ve taken really good care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love driving it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis has been addressed with rear subframe reinforcements, and the VANOS system has been professionally serviced to ensure optimal variable valve timing. Equipped with a mechanical limited-slip differential and refreshed suspension bushings, this example maintains the sharp turn-in and communicative steering rack the chassis is known for. A mechanically sound driver's car with excellent throttle response and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor road wear consistent with careful use, while the interior features pristine upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it performs flawlessly; I’ve ensured regular fluid changes and recently completed a full brake service to provide the next owner with peace of mind. It drives straight, shifts smoothly, and offers a quiet, comfortable ride. This is a dependable, high-quality example that balances performance with everyday reliability.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers a refined driving experience. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, it offers an exceptional balance of performance and value.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring consistent performance and mechanical integrity. The interior and exterior remain in commendable condition, reflecting a history of responsible ownership. This offering represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's looking for a great new home. It’s been super well-maintained and runs like a dream—perfect for daily commutes or weekend road trips! It's in really solid shape and ready to hit the road today. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love how it handles!

Equipped with the high-revving S65 4.0L V8, this E92 M3 delivers linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. The mechanical suite includes individual throttle bodies and a specialized M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring maximum traction out of corners. This example features a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and has received critical preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing its signature aluminum subframes to maintain handling precision. While the aesthetics reflect its mileage, the drivetrain remains potent and the hydraulic steering rack provides the communicative feedback enthusiasts crave. A mechanically sound driver’s car optimized for performance.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Recent service history. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal, perfect for a discerning driver who values a well-maintained machine. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor, negligible character marks typical of responsible road use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and inviting; the upholstery is supple and free of any significant wear or odors, while all electronic features—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, a testament to a consistent preventative maintenance schedule and recent fluid services. The tires have excellent tread remaining, and the braking is firm and responsive. This car has been garage-kept and smoke-free, offering a turnkey experience for its next owner who desires a dependable, high-quality vehicle without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a premier balance of performance and long-term reliability. Presenting in commendable condition, the automobile has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it adheres to our rigorous mechanical and aesthetic standards. Its refined interior and robust powertrain offer a sophisticated driving experience that distinguishes it within its class.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and value. Characterized by its documented service history and consistent mechanical integrity, the automobile presents in commendable condition, both aesthetically and operationally. Every component has been rigorously evaluated to ensure it meets our high standards for safety and dependable performance.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333 hp via individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. This example maintains its mechanical integrity with a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings across the multi-link rear suspension. The 6-speed manual gearbox offers crisp engagement, paired with a factory-spec M Variable Differential Lock for optimal torque distribution. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its mileage, the chassis remains stiff and the engine pulls strongly to its 8,000 RPM redline. Recent preventative maintenance includes a valve adjustment and rod bearing inspection, ensuring this high-revving masterpiece is ready for the canyon roads.
Used car in good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean interior and exterior. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between daily utility and refined comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the minor, honest character marks expected of a well-loved car that has been kept under a covered stall. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is a sanctuary; the leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, while the dashboard and trim pieces are in excellent shape with no sun fading. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium surround-sound system and one-touch moonroof, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready. It has benefited from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule, resulting in a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive, quiet engine. With a fresh set of tires and recent brake service, it delivers a confident and composed ride. This is a solid, reliable choice for a discerning buyer looking for a high-quality pre-owned vehicle without the new-car price tag.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit features a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile, having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for operational excellence. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile.
